scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @nexus/client" "npm run dev -w @nexus/server"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nexus/shared && npm run build -w @nexus/server && npm run build -w @nexus/client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @nexus/client && npm run lint -w @nexus/server
